languages.text: {n}Кожа рядом с аугментами натягиваетcя, и вы понимаете, что Себериан хмурится.{/n} "Кто вы так{mf|ой|ая}?"
{n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"
languages.original_text: {n}Кожа рядом с аугментами натягиваетcя, и вы понимаете, что Себериан хмурится.{/n} "Кто вы так{mf|ой|ая}?"

traits.locale_text: {n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"
{n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"
{n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"

languages.text: {n}他植入物周围的皮肤紧绷起来，你意识到塞贝里安在皱眉。{/n}“你是谁？”
languages.original_text: {n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}他植入物周围的皮肤紧绷起来，你意识到塞贝里安在皱眉。{/n}“你是谁？”

languages.text: {n}La peau qui borde ses implants se tend, et vous comprenez alors que Seberian fronce les sourcils.{/n} « Qui êtes-vous ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La peau qui borde ses implants se tend, et vous comprenez alors que Seberian fronce les sourcils.{/n} « Qui êtes-vous ? »

languages.text: {n}Ogmentlerini çevreleyen cilt geriliyor, Seberian'ın çatılan kaşlarını fark ediyorsun.{/n} "Sen de kimsin?"
languages.original_text: {n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ogmentlerini çevreleyen cilt geriliyor, Seberian'ın çatılan kaşlarını fark ediyorsun.{/n} "Sen de kimsin?"

languages.text: {n}La piel que rodea sus aumentos se estira, y te percatas de que Seberian frunce el ceño.{/n} «¿Quién es usted?».
languages.original_text: {n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La piel que rodea sus aumentos se estira, y te percatas de que Seberian frunce el ceño.{/n} «¿Quién es usted?».

languages.text: {n}Die an seine Augmentationen grenzende Haut strafft sich, als Seberian offenbar die Stirn runzelt.{/n} "Wer seid Ihr?"
languages.original_text: {n}The skin that borders his augments tightens, and you realise that Seberian is frowning.{/n} "Who are you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Die an seine Augmentationen grenzende Haut strafft sich, als Seberian offenbar die Stirn runzelt.{/n} "Wer seid Ihr?"

languages.text:
{n}彼の増幅器に接する皮膚が引き締まり、セベリアンが眉をひそめていることに気づく。{/n}
「あなたは誰だ？」
